title: 10 best herbal creams for hyperthyroidism

remedy_properties: Guggulsterones: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce thyroid inflammation and oxidative stress associated with hyperthyroidism.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Commiphora mukul, also known as guggul, creams helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain guggulsterones, which have been shown to regulate thyroid hormone production. The active compounds in Commiphora mukul have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce thyroid gland activity, leading to a decrease in thyroid hormone levels. Additionally, guggulsterones may also help to reduce the conversion of T4 to T3, further alleviating hyperthyroid symptoms. This natural remedy has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for centuries to balance thyroid function.
remedy_constituents: Guggulsterones: These terpenoids have been shown to have a regulatory effect on thyroid hormones, helping to reduce the production of excess thyroid hormones in hyperthyroidism.
Commiphora mukul resin acids (gum resin acids): These components may help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the thyroid gland, which can contribute to hyperthyroidism.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried commiphora mukul resin from a trusted supplier to ensure quality and potency.
Mix the dried resin with 100 grams of beeswax in a double boiler to create a stable mixture.
Add 50 grams of coconut oil and 20 grams of shea butter to the mixture and stir until fully incorporated.
Heat the mixture to 180 degrees fahrenheit for 20 minutes to ensure the ingredients are fully melted and blended.
Pour the mixture into small containers and allow it to cool and solidify completely before use.

remedy_recipe: Weigh 250 grams of withania somnifera root powder and mix it with 50 grams of beeswax.
Combine the powder and beeswax mixture with 100 grams of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 160°f to 180°f for 30 minutes to dissolve the beeswax.
Stir in 50 grams of shea butter and 20 grams of vitamin e oil into the mixture.
Pour the mixture into sterilized containers and let it set at room temperature for 2 hours.

remedy_recipe: Harvest melissa officinalis leaves and flowers in the early morning to ensure optimal essential oil content.
Dry the harvested melissa officinalis leaves and flowers in a temperature-controlled environment for 2 weeks.
Infuse 100g of dried melissa officinalis in 1 liter of oil carrier at a 1:10 ratio for 2 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth and discard the solids to obtain 950ml of melissa oil.
Mix the melissa oil with beeswax and emulsifying wax in a 20:5 ratio to create a stable cream base.

Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes while occasionally stirring to ensure even extraction of the herbal properties.

Melt the mixture in a double boiler at 120-140°f for 10-15 minutes with constant stirring.
Pour the cooled cream mixture into a sterilized container and store in the refrigerator for up to 6 weeks.

Heat the mixture for 20 minutes or until the beeswax and coconut oil are fully incorporated and melted.

remedy_recipe: Harvest dried thymus vulgaris leaves from a trusted source or purchase them from a reputable supplier weighing approximately one ounce.
Grind the dried thymus vulgaris leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder taking about 10 minutes.
Combine the ground thymus vulgaris powder with 1/4 cup of coconut oil and 1/4 cup of beeswax in a double boiler heating mixture for 30-40 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool until it reaches a temperature of around 140°f then whip with an electric mixer until creamy and smooth taking about 10 minutes.
Transfer the cream to glass jars filled to the top and store in a cool dark place at room temperature for up to six months.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers and grind them into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered matricaria chamomilla with 20 grams of beeswax, 30 grams of coconut oil, and 10 grams of shea butter in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the beeswax is fully melted and the mixture reaches 120°f to 140°f.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool to around 100°f to 110°f before whipping it with an electric whisk or spatula for about 10 minutes until it thickens.
Pour the cooled and whipped cream mixture into glass jars, store them in a cool dark place, and use within six months as needed.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's potent anti-inflammatory compound, curcumin, helps reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and surrounding tissues, which can alleviate symptoms such as swelling, pain, and discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: Turmeric's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can damage thyroid tissue and disrupt its function, promoting a healthy thyroid gland and reducing oxidative stress.

Immune-modulating properties: Turmeric has been shown to modulate the immune system, which can help reduce an overactive thyroid response by regulating the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and improving overall immune balance.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in curcumin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound that helps to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with hyperthyroidism.
Roots: Contains a wealth of bioactive compounds, including volatile oils and sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to have anti-thyroid and antioxidant properties.
remedy_recipe: Dry curcuma longa roots for 2 days in a warm dry place until they reach a dark brown color.
Grind 100 grams of dried curcuma longa roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix the powdered curcuma longa with 200 grams of sweet almond oil and 50 grams of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at a low temperature for 30 minutes or until the beeswax melts completely.
Allow the cream to cool and thicken for 2 hours before transferring it into sterilized glass jars.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ceylon cinnamon creams helps with hyperthyroidism because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The unique compounds present in Ceylon cinnamon, such as cinnamaldehyde, have been shown to inhibit the production of thyroid-stimulating hormones (TSH), which can help regulate an overactive thyroid gland. Additionally, Ceylon cinnamon has been found to reduce inflammation in the body, which is often a common symptom associated with hyperthyroidism. By incorporating Ceylon cinnamon creams into one's daily routine, individuals may experience relief from symptoms such as anxiety, fatigue, and weight loss.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Ceylon cinnamon creams contain anti-inflammatory compounds like cinnamaldehyde, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with hyperthyroidism, alleviating symptoms such as joint pain and fatigue.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in Ceylon cinnamon creams, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, can help protect the body from oxidative damage caused by free radicals, which is thought to contribute to the development of hyperthyroidism-related complications.

Thyroid-regulating compounds: Ceylon cinnamon has been shown to have a regulatory effect on thyroid function, potentially helping to normalize thyroid hormone production and alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism such as rapid heartbeat, weight loss, and anxiety.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help soothe thyroid gland inflammation and reduce symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
Rhyzomes: Containing a unique combination of bioactive compounds, rhyzomes exhibit anti-thyroid and anti-inflammatory properties that benefit hyperthyroid patients.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh cinnamomum verum bark and dry it in a warm oven at 150°f for 2 hours.
Combine 10 grams of dried cinnamomum verum bark with 100 milliliters of olive oil and let it steep for 24 hours.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth and combine the infused oil with 20 grams of beeswax, 10 grams of coconut oil, and 5 milliliters of vitamin e oil.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at 160°f until the beeswax is fully melted, stirring occasionally for 30 minutes.
Remove from heat, let it cool and thicken for 2 hours before transferring it to an airtight container for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng creams helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain bioactive compounds that promote relaxation, reduce stress levels, and calm the nervous system. The adaptogenic properties of ginseng help regulate the body's response to stress, which is often exacerbated in individuals with hyperthyroidism. Additionally, ginseng has been shown to improve sleep quality, alleviate anxiety and depression symptoms, and enhance cognitive function. By addressing these underlying issues, herbal ginseng creams can help alleviate some of the uncomfortable symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Ginseng helps regulate the body's response to stress, which can alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as anxiety and fatigue by promoting balance in the body's hormonal system.

Antioxidant effects: Ginseng's antioxidant properties may help reduce oxidative stress caused by excessive thyroid hormone production, which can contribute to inflammation and tissue damage associated with hyperthyroidism.
Vasodilatory effects: Ginseng's ability to dilate blood vessels may help reduce symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as increased heart rate and blood pressure by improving blood flow and circulation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Known for their adaptogenic properties, ginseng roots help regulate thyroid function and reduce symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzome portion of the ginseng plant contains bioactive compounds that can help calm down an overactive thyroid gland.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 20 grams of dried panax ginseng root powder and add it to a glass bowl.
Combine 100 milliliters of coconut oil and 50 milliliters of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 70°c for 10 minutes or until the beeswax is fully melted.
Add 5 grams of vitamin e oil and 2 grams of aloe vera gel to the warm mixture and stir well.
Pour the final mixture into glass jars and refrigerate it for 30 days before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort creams help with hyperthyroidism because they contain hyperforin, a natural compound that has been shown to decrease thyroid hormone levels. The cream works by binding to specific receptors in the body, which helps to reduce the production of thyroxine (T4) and triiodothyronine (T3). This can lead to a reduction in symptoms such as anxiety, rapid heartbeat, and weight loss associated with hyperthyroidism. Additionally, St John's Wort cream has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate joint pain and swelling that often accompanies this condition.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: This compound has been shown to inhibit the conversion of T4 to T3, which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as rapid heartbeat and weight loss.

Hypotensive properties: The flavonoids present in St John's Wort have been found to exhibit vasodilatory effects, which can help reduce blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism-induced hypertension.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidant compounds in St John's Wort cream may help mitigate oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism, which can contribute to tissue damage and other complications.
remedy_parts: Roots: Containing a high concentration of bioactive compounds, roots are used to create creams that help regulate thyroid hormone production and reduce inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.

Flowers: Rich in flavonoids and hyperforin, the flowers are processed into creams that possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as anxiety and insomnia.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh hypericum perforatum leaves in the early morning dew-covered state with scissors for 100g.
Dry the harvested leaves in a single layer using air circulation method at room temperature for 24 hours.
Grind dried hypericum perforatum leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix ground hypericum perforatum powder with sweet almond oil at a ratio of 1:2 and heat at low temperature for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth and store in dark glass containers at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Feverfew creams help with hyperthyroidism because they contain parthenolide, a natural compound that has been shown to reduce thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) levels and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties also help to soothe the discomfort associated with thyroid-related inflammation. Additionally, feverfew's ability to stabilize blood sugar levels can aid in managing the metabolic changes caused by an overactive thyroid gland. By applying the cream topically, individuals with hyperthyroidism may experience relief from symptoms such as heat intolerance, anxiety, and rapid heartbeat.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory effects: Feverfew creams contain parthenolide, a compound that has potent anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with hyperthyroidism.
Antioxidant activity: Feverfew contains antioxidants like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help neutralize free radicals and oxidative stress that can exacerbate hyperthyroidism symptoms.

Calcitonin-stimulating properties: Feverfew has been shown to stimulate the production of calcitonin, a hormone that helps regulate calcium levels in the body, which is particularly important for individuals with hyperthyroidism who may experience bone loss and increased risk of osteoporosis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Feverfew roots are rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
Buds: Feverfew buds contain parthenolide, a compound that has been shown to reduce thyroid hormone production and alleviate hyperthyroidism symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh tanacetum parthenium leaves, ensuring they are free of pesticides and other contaminants.
Dry the leaves using a food dehydrator at 150°f (65°c) for 6 hours or until crumbly to preserve potency.
Grind 100g dried tanacetum parthenium leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 20g of the powdered tanacetum parthenium with 80g of sweet almond oil in a small saucepan, heating gently over low heat.
Allow the mixture to infuse for 24 hours before straining and bottling the resulting cream in dark glass containers.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for hyperthyroidism are topical treatments that combine natural herbs with moisturizing ingredients to help alleviate symptoms of an overactive thyroid gland. They work by reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and regulating thyroid function. Examples of herbal creams that help with hyperthyroidism include ashwagandha, chamomile, and lavender creams. These creams can improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety, and alleviate symptoms such as tremors and heat intolerance, significantly improving the quality of life for individuals with hyperthyroidism.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hyperthyroidism that are treated with herbal creams are often related to thyroid dysfunction or hormonal imbalances. For example, herbal creams may be used to treat hypothyroidism, adrenal fatigue, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), which can present with symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and mood changes. These herbal creams often contain ingredients like ashwagandha, bladderwrack, and saw palmetto, which are believed to support thyroid function and hormone balance.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with hyperthyroidism is a blend of ashwagandha, triphala, and gotu kola. Ashwagandha has adaptogenic properties that help regulate thyroid function, while triphala aids in detoxification and reducing inflammation. Gotu kola, rich in antioxidants, soothes the thyroid gland and promotes healing. These creams can be used topically or taken internally in supplement form, under the guidance of a healthcare professional. This synergistic blend can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism and promote overall thyroid health.
